sources.name: FederalRegister.gov API
notes: Docs state FederalRegister.gov APIs do not require API keys.
Live document search, rule/proposed-rule filter, and agency filter were validated.

sources.name: Regulations.gov API v4
notes: Docs require an API key via X-Api-Key or sample api_key query usage.
Live docket detail, comments by docket, and comment deadline filters were validated with DEMO_KEY.
Page size must be 5 or greater.
